violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. Cutting board on the prep table behind the serving counter had blue liquid under it.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sani-bucket was old and did not have sanitizer solution in it. when tested registered 0ppm. Other buckets were 200ppm.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floor throughout should be swept more frequently.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop not hung to drip and dry when not in use.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
